hero_match.title: New Zealand vs South Africa 4th T20I (Match Concluded)

ranked_matches.title: AFC U20 Asian Cup China, 2025 (Tournament in April 2026)

summary: The New Zealand vs South Africa 4th T20I concluded today with South Africa winning by 19 runs to level the series 2-2. The Sheffield Shield 2024-25 Final between Victoria and South Australia is scheduled to begin on March 26, 2026. No matches were found for Chandigarh T20 or the AFC U20 Asian Cup today.
